title: Competitor Intelligence
description: Understand how each competitor is moving across campaigns, promotions, positioning and category focus.
readOnly: Read-only mode. Analyst or admin access is required to add or remove competitors.
addSenderDomains: Add sender domains to start tracking signals.
emptyDesc: Add the companies you want to monitor. This page turns newsletters, ads and insights into a strategic profile per competitor.
senderDomainsHint: Used to auto-assign imported newsletters to this competitor.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}? This will not delete associated newsletters or analyses, but they will no longer be linked to this competitor.
csvImportPreview: Preview of {{count}} competitor(s) to import. Expected columns: name, website, domains.
competitorAddedMatched: Matched {{count}} inbox email(s) to this competitor.
competitorAddedNoMatch: No existing inbox emails matched yet.
accessDeniedAdd: Analyst or admin access is required to add competitors.
accessDeniedRemove: Analyst or admin access is required to remove competitors.
limitReachedDesc: Upgrade your plan to track more competitors.
noIntelligenceDesc: Add sender domains, sync Gmail or connect more signals. Once newsletters, ads or insights are linked, this profile becomes strategic.

profile.title: Promotion behavior
profile.desc: Offer depth, urgency mechanics and conversion pressure.
profile.categoryFocusDesc: Top product and content categories by mention frequency.
profile.categoryFocusEmpty: Visible once newsletter extractions or insight categories are available.
profile.campaignClustersDesc: Distribution of campaign types across all observed signals.

timeline.activityOverTimeDesc: Monthly signal volume across emails, ads and insights (last 6 months).
timeline.campaignTimelineDesc: Recent launches, pushes and strategic signals in chronological order.

strategy.positioningStrategyDesc: Derived from observed positioning angles, channel mix and pricing posture.
strategy.messagingEvolutionDesc: How the narrative is shifting across campaigns and positioning angles.
strategy.noWeaknesses: No obvious weaknesses have surfaced yet.
strategy.recurringPatternsDesc: Consistent behavioral signals detected across the observation window.
strategy.topStrategicSignalsDesc: Highest-value AI briefs linked to this competitor.

opportunities.none: No opportunities or gaps detected yet.
opportunities.noneDesc: Opportunities surface once enough signals are available to detect whitespace in competitor strategy.

descriptionPlaceholder: Add a description for this competitor…
descriptionFallback: This profile aggregates tracked newsletters, Meta ads and AI insights linked to this competitor.
